# stepsRequired

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Reads and enables pagination through a set of `AppLevelRequirement`.

## Usage

```typescript
useStepsRequiredQuery({ vlevel: '<value>', vroleId: '<value>', first: '<value>', offset: '<value>', after: '<value>' })
```

## Examples

### Use useStepsRequiredQuery

```typescript
const { data, isLoading } = useStepsRequiredQuery({ vlevel: '<value>', vroleId: '<value>', first: '<value>', offset: '<value>', after: '<value>' });
```
